questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует структуру 'Hardly... when'?

choices.text: Hardly we arrived when the storm began.
Hardly had we arrived when the storm began.
Hardly we had arrived when the storm began.
Hardly had we arrived when the storm begins.

questions.explanation: В конструкции 'Hardly... when' обязательна инверсия (Hardly had + subject + V3) и Past Simple во второй части.

choices.text: Scarcely she left the house when the phone rang.
Scarcely had she left the house when the phone rang.
Scarcely she had left the house when the phone rang.
Scarcely had she left the house when the phone rings.

questions.explanation: Инверсия обязательна: 'Scarcely had + subject + V3, when + Past Simple'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит правильную структуру 'Barely... when'?

choices.text: Barely I had finished the work when the meeting started.
Barely had I finished the work when the meeting started.
Barely I finished the work when the meeting started.
Barely had I finished the work when the meeting starts.

questions.explanation: В конструкции 'Barely... when' требуется инверсия и Past Simple во второй части.

choices.text: Hardly had they left the building when the alarm sounded.
Hardly they had left the building when the alarm sounded.
Hardly had they left the building when the alarm had sounded.

questions.explanation: Отсутствует инверсия: правильный вариант требует 'Hardly had + subject'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку во второй части конструкции 'Scarcely... when'?

choices.text: Scarcely had he entered the room when the lights went out.
Scarcely had he entered the room when the lights had gone out.
Scarcely had he entered the room when the lights were out.

questions.explanation: Вторая часть должна быть Past Simple, а не Past Perfect ('had gone').

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верно отражает структуру 'Barely... when'?

choices.text: Barely had the train departed when the platform closed.
Barely the train had departed when the platform closed.
Barely had the train departed when the platform had closed.
Barely the train departed when the platform closed.

questions.explanation: Правильная структура: 'Barely had + subject + V3, when + Past Simple'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит неверную инверсию в 'Hardly... when'?

choices.text: Hardly had the children finished their homework when the teacher arrived.
Hardly the children had finished their homework when the teacher arrived.

questions.explanation: Инверсия отсутствует: правильный вариант требует 'Hardly had + subject'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант ошибочно использует время в 'Scarcely... when'?

choices.text: Scarcely had she opened the door when the wind blew.
Scarcely she had opened the door when the wind blew.
Scarcely had she opened the door when the wind had blown.

questions.explanation: Вторая часть должна быть Past Simple, а не Past Perfect ('had blown').

choices.text: Barely had the sun risen when the birds began to sing.
Barely the sun had risen when the birds began to sing.
Barely had the sun risen when the birds had begun to sing.
Barely the sun rose when the birds began to sing.

questions.explanation: Инверсия и Past Simple во второй части соответствуют правилу.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку в структуре 'Hardly... when'?

choices.text: Hardly had they begun the discussion when the power failed.
Hardly they had begun the discussion when the power failed.

questions.explanation: Отсутствует инверсия: правильный вариант требует 'Hardly had + subject'.
